data: {"generalSituation":"The northeast monsoon affecting the coast of Guangdong will moderate gradually in the next couple of days. The weather will become humid over the region. Winds will be weak over Guangdong on Thursday, there will be coastal fog in the morning. It will be rather warm during the day. An easterly airstream is expected to affect the coast of southern China on Friday to early next week, a band of clouds will also cover the region.","weatherForecast":[{"forecastDate":"20260317","week":"Tuesday","forecastWind":"East force 4.","forecastWeather":"Sunny periods.","forecastMaxtemp":{"value":24,"unit":"C"},"forecastMintemp":{"value":19,"unit":"C"},"forecastMaxrh":{"value":90,"unit":"percent"},"forecastMinrh":{"value":65,"unit":"percent"},"ForecastIcon":51,"PSR":"Low"},{"forecastDate":"20260318","week":"Wednesday","forecastWind":"East force 3 to 4, light winds force 2 later.","forecastWeather":"Mainly cloudy.
